questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно показывает длительный процесс и событие в прошедшем времени?

choices.text: While I cooked, the phone was ringing.
While I was cooking, the phone rang.
When I cooked, the phone rang.
As I cooked, it started to rain.

questions.explanation: Правильно: while + Past Continuous (длительный процесс) + Past Simple (событие). Вариант b: 'While I was cooking, the phone rang.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит типичную ошибку с 'when'?

choices.text: When I was studying, the bell rang.
When I studied, the bell was ringing.
I was studying when the bell rang.
As I studied, the bell rang.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'when' не используется с длительным процессом без события. Правильно: 'When I was studying, the bell rang.' Вариант b неправильный, так как 'when' + Past Simple (событие) вместо Past Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'as' для описания события?

choices.text: As she left, it started to rain.
As she was leaving, it started to rain.
As she left, it was raining.
When she was leaving, it started to rain.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'as' + Past Continuous (длительное действие) + Past Simple (событие). Вариант b: 'As she was leaving, it started to rain.'

choices.text: While I was reading, she called.
While I read, she called.
While I was reading, she was calling.
While I read, the door opened.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'while' требует Past Continuous для длительного процесса. Вариант b: 'While I read' (Past Simple) неправильный. Правильно: 'While I was reading.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно показывает фон (процесс) и событие?

choices.text: When I cooked, the phone rang.
While I was cooking, the phone rang.
As I cooked, the phone rang.
When I was cooking, the phone was ringing.

questions.explanation: Правильно: фон (длительный процесс) — Past Continuous, событие — Past Simple. Вариант b: 'While I was cooking, the phone rang.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит ошибку в использовании 'when'?

choices.text: I was sleeping when the alarm went off.
I was sleeping when the alarm was going off.
I was sleeping when the alarm rang.
When I was sleeping, the alarm rang.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'when' не используется с Past Continuous для события. Правильно: 'I was sleeping when the alarm rang.' Вариант b: 'alarm was going off' неправильно.

choices.text: As he was walking, it started to rain.
As he walked, it started to rain.
As he was walking, it was raining.
When he was walking, it started to rain.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'as' + Past Continuous + Past Simple. Вариант a: 'As he was walking, it started to rain.'

choices.text: While she was cooking, I called.
While she cooked, I called.
While she was cooking, I was calling.
While she cooked, the phone rang.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'while' требует Past Continuous для длительного процесса. Вариант d: 'While she cooked' (Past Simple) неправильный. Правильно: 'While she was cooking.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно описывает событие в прошедшем времени?

choices.text: When I was watching TV, the door opened.
When I watched TV, the door was opening.
When I was watching TV, the door was opening.
While I watched TV, the door opened.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'when' + Past Continuous (длительный процесс) + Past Simple (событие). Вариант a: 'When I was watching TV, the door opened.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит ошибку в структуре 'while'?

choices.text: While I was sleeping, the alarm rang.
While I slept, the alarm rang.
While I was sleeping, the alarm was ringing.
While I slept, the phone rang.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'while' требует Past Continuous для длительного процесса. Вариант d: 'While I slept' (Past Simple) неправильный. Правильно: 'While I was sleeping.'
